Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a predefined category for expenses, used for organization and reporting.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

label.description: The human-readable name of the category, e.g., 'Food', 'Transport'.

emoji.description: The emoji icon associated with the category for visual identification.

color.description: A hexadecimal color code used for UI representation of the category.

QuickAddShortcut.title: QuickAddShortcut
QuickAddShortcut.description: Represents a pre-configured shortcut for quickly adding common expenses.

id.description: Unique identifier for the QuickAddShortcut entity.

label.description: The display label for the quick add shortcut, e.g., 'Breakfast', 'Taxi'.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category this shortcut belongs to. (Relationship: Category 1:N QuickAddShortcut)

emoji.description: The emoji icon associated with the quick add shortcut.

amount.description: The default monetary amount for this quick add shortcut.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Represents a single financial transaction or expenditure made by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Expense entity.

date.description: The date when the expense occurred.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category the expense belongs to. (Relationship: Category 1:N Expense)

description.description: A brief description of what the expense was for.

amount.description: The monetary value of the expense.

paymentMethod.description: The method used to pay for the expense, e.g., 'Cash', 'Transfer', 'Card'.

person.description: Optional. The person or entity associated with the expense (e.g., 'Teacher Adriano').

notes.description: Optional. Any additional notes or details about the expense.

FixedExpense.title: FixedExpense
FixedExpense.description: Represents a recurring financial obligation (fixed expense) like rent or utilities.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FixedExpense entity.

label.description: The name of the recurring expense.

amount.description: The fixed amount for this recurring expense.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category this fixed expense belongs to.

dueDay.description: The day of the month when the expense is typically due (1-31).

definition.description: Stores individual expense records for a specific user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this expense record.

params.name: expenseId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific expense record.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this fixed expense.

params.name: fixedExpenseId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific fixed expense record.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this quick add shortcut.

params.name: shortcutId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific quick add shortcut.

definition.description: Stores predefined global categories for expenses.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific predefined category.

firestore.reasoning: Standard path-based ownership for user data (Expenses, FixedExpenses, Shortcuts) and top-level public read-only collection for Categories.
